user_reflection.why_different: The analysis is mostly accurate. I was trying to stay focused during this quick 4-minute review session before my class. The fidgeting was because I was a bit anxious about the upcoming exam, not really a sign of poor concentration. I'd say I was actually more focused than the score suggests, despite the restlessness.
what_helped_focus: Very short session (easier to maintain focus)

feedback_on_recommendations.quieter_space: Acknowledged - will try to study in the library next time
feedback_on_recommendations.minimize_fidgeting: Will be more intentional about posture and movement
feedback_on_recommendations.noise_cancelling_headphones: Good idea - already have a pair, will use them for longer study sessions
